title: AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM TEN,ab.MARINDUQUE. SECTION THREE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5162 / 52 OG No. 7, 3531 (July, 1956)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1462, June 14, 1956 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM TEN,

ab.

MARINDUQUE. SECTION THREE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item ten, ab. Marinduque, section three of Republic Act Numbered Fourteen hundred eleven, is hereby amended to read as follows:
